name: infras-kit
description: Infrastructure ticket-to-plan-to-implementation workflow and skill pack for Codex, Claude Code, and OpenCode.

interface.shortDescription: Infra ticket-to-plan-to-implementation framework plus domain skills.
interface.longDescription: A lightweight infrastructure delivery framework (ticket -> spec -> plan -> tasks -> implementation notes) plus opinionated domain skills for IaC (Terraform+Terragrunt), Helm, Kubernetes troubleshooting, CI/CD hardening, repo hygiene, and audits.
defaultPrompt: Use infra-kit.iac to scaffold a reusable module and/or Terragrunt layout.
Use infra-kit.iac to review this IaC directory for risky issues and destructive change risk.
Use helm to scaffold or review a Kubernetes chart with safer defaults.
Use k8s-doctor to trace a workload issue from Pod to Service to route using read-only checks first.
Use infra-kit.iac to design a multi-environment layout with safe remote state conventions.
Use infra-kit.github to review this CI workflow for permission and fork-safety issues.
Use infra-kit.github to standardize repository ownership and delivery guidance.
Use infra-kit to drive a ticket into spec/plan/tasks, then use the domain skills to implement safely.
